title: Upstart Holdings, Inc. (UPST) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Upstart Holdings Q2 2024 earnings came in with mixed results. The company reported approximately 144,000 loan transactions, up 31% year-over-year and 21% sequentially. Fee revenue was $131 million, down 9% year-over-year, with net revenue of $128 million, down 6% year-over-year. GAAP net loss was $54 million and adjusted EBITDA was negative $9 million. Contribution margin was 58%, flat sequentially and two percentage points above guidance. The company guided Q3 2024 revenue of approximately $150 million with positive adjusted EBITDA expected in Q4 2024. Management emphasized that improvements were driven by internal operational gains rather than macro tailwinds.
